era: 2011-present. Punk. E=6 -- deliberate drop after E=7-8 streak. Deadpan sardonic punk. Kill Rock Stars. Seattle.
associated_musicians: Bikini Kill (Kill Rock Stars peer, degree 276)

theory_nodes.concept: E=6 deliberate drop. After E=7-8 streak (277-280: Sleater-Kinney, Unwound, Seven Year Bitch, The Gits), Wimps steps to E=6. Deadpan precision replaces ferocity. Both are punk; different temperatures.
theory_nodes.description: The deliberate energy drop: sardonic observation after sustained ferocity.

theory_nodes.concept: Kill Rock Stars second engine entry. First: Bikini Kill (276). Second: Wimps (281). Both women-fronted punk, Seattle, same label. Thirty years apart. The lineage is continuous.
theory_nodes.description: Kill Rock Stars: riot grrrl founding to contemporary punk. Two entries.

theory_nodes.concept: Deadpan punk tradition. Buzzcocks, Wire, Wimps. Observation rather than confrontation. The precisely described recognition that produces a laugh and a flinch simultaneously.
theory_nodes.description: Wimps in the deadpan punk tradition: specific, dry, efficient.

cross_references.relationship: Kill Rock Stars first entry. E=8. Riot grrrl founding band. Wimps carries the label lineage thirty years forward.
E=8 energy peak preceding Wimps. The deliberate drop to E=6 marks the transition out of the sustained high-energy women-punk streak.
E=7 rises again. Punk pop. Capitol Hill. Hardly Art. The energy climbs out of the E=6 Wimps tamp.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6 + E=6 = E=12. Dall's Porpoise: fastest cetacean (35 mph), creates distinctive rooster tail spray at speed. Efficiency and precision at E=6: not explosion, visible result. Wimps: efficient punk, observable observation. Both precise, both brisk, both E=6.
